payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current matching memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it has been superseded, so presenting it as current would be incorrect.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered because it is marked superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall query targeted Sam from Goldman, and mem_new is the non-superseded matching memory. mem_old refers to the same or overlapping subject but is superseded, so it was filtered from current recall results.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was selected for recall as the active/current memory for Sam from Goldman, while mem_old was excluded because it is superseded.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.
Did not present superseded memory as current.

repair_options: If mem_old should still be visible, inspect its superseded flag or superseded_by link.
If mem_new is incorrect, update or remove the supersession relationship.
If Sam from Goldman was incorrectly resolved, review entity resolution for Sam and Goldman.
